name: Code to Product Transformation
description: A panel of live syntax-highlighted source code dissolves into a stream of glowing character particles that stream across the canvas and reassemble into a polished product UI screenshot. A continuous 'code becomes product' loop for developer-tool and SaaS landing pages.

fields.label: Heading
fields.default: From a single line of code to a finished product.

fields.label: Subheading
fields.default: Watch your source materialise into the UI your users will love. Real components, real syntax — no mockups, no detours.

fields.label: Column 1
fields.default:
Ship the idea, not the boilerplate

Source becomes interface in seconds, not sprints.

fields.label: Column 2
fields.default:
Type-safe, by design

Every transformation respects your data model.

fields.label: On click
fields.description: URL to navigate to when clicked. From code you can also pass a function — same prop name, type-detected at runtime.

fields.label: Code
fields.description: The source displayed in the left panel. Real JSX / TS looks best. Each line is rendered with a lightweight syntax highlighter.

fields.label: Panel label
fields.description: Tiny filename badge at the top of the code panel.

fields.label: Code panel theme
fields.description: Editor-style colour scheme for the code panel only. Independent of the overall hero accent palette below.

fields.label: Product screenshot
fields.description: PNG / JPG / WebP / AVIF — the rendered UI your code transforms into. Defaults to a dashboard sample.

fields.label: Product badge
fields.description: Pill badge on the left of the product chrome row. Empty string hides it.

fields.label: Product meta text
fields.description: Small text on the right of the product chrome row (version / status / environment, etc.). Empty string hides it.

fields.label: Transformation speed
fields.description: How fast each particle travels from code to product. 0.7 is the relaxed default; push to 2+ for a faster, busier read.

fields.label: Particle density
fields.description: Relative number of particles streaming at once. 0.2 reads as a controlled stream; 0.6 is a heavy river.

fields.label: Particle size
fields.description: Multiplier on the rendered particle radius. Small values keep individual characters readable; large values bloom into a glowing wash.

fields.label: Arc curvature
fields.description: How much the stream arcs upward (positive) or downward (negative) between code and product. 0 is a perfectly horizontal river — particles flow flat with no lift or descent.

fields.label: Trail length
fields.description: Persistence of the glowing trail behind each particle. 0 = no trail; 1 = long comet streaks.

fields.label: Pointer influence
fields.description: How strongly the cursor swirls and pushes particles aside as it passes through the stream. 0 disables the interaction.

fields.label: Theme
fields.description: Curated palette presets. Switch to 'Custom' to override individual hues below.

fields.label: Transparent background
fields.description: Drop the deep gradient backdrop so the hero composites cleanly on top of your own page background.

fields.label: Background
fields.description: Deep base colour painted behind the two panels.
